notes: Case 2009-15, Complaint of TE Mark Robinson, et al. vs. Metro New York Presbytery, was found judicially out of order. No decision opinion exists; the case appears only in the docket list and administrative disposition of the SJC report at GA 38 (2010). The case was docketed in 2009 but ruled out of order in 2010, preventing substantive adjudication.
